name: Portgas.D.Ace
effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.) [On Play] Draw 2 cards and place 2 cards from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Edison
effect: [On Play] If you have 2 or less Life cards, draw 2 cards and trash 2 card from your hand.

name: Charlotte Pudding
effect: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sanji] or {Big Mom Pirates} type card other than [Charlotte Pudding] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
